dialogue: Woman: The boy is sitting under the tree and reading a book.
question: Which description best matches what you heard?
options: (A) The boy is sitting under a tree and reading.
(B) The boy is climbing a big tree to play.
(C) The boy is sitting at his desk doing homework.
explanation: 句子說「男孩坐在樹下看書」，(A) 完全符合，故選 A。(B) 爬樹、(C) 在書桌前，均與句意不符。
optionsZh: 男孩坐在書桌前寫作業。

dialogue: Man: The woman is carrying two heavy bags and walking toward the bus stop.
question: Which description best matches what you heard?
options: (A) A woman is walking to the supermarket with empty hands.
(B) A woman is carrying two heavy bags toward the bus stop.
(C) A woman is sitting on a bus and resting.
explanation: 句子說「女士提著兩個重袋走向公車站」，(B) 完全符合，故選 B。(A) 空手、(C) 坐在車上，均不符。
optionsZh: 女士提著兩個重袋走向公車站。

dialogue: Woman: It has been raining since morning and the streets are flooded.
question: Which description best matches what you heard?
options: (A) The sky is sunny and the roads are dry.
(B) It rained a little but stopped quickly.
(C) It has been raining all morning and the streets are flooded.
explanation: 句子說「從早上就下著雨，街道積水」，(C) 完全符合，故選 C。(A) 晴天、(B) 雨已停，均不符。
optionsZh: 下了點小雨，很快就停了。
從早上就一直下雨，街道積水。

dialogue: Man: The girl is watering the flowers in the garden while listening to music.
question: Which description best matches what you heard?
options: (A) A girl is playing guitar inside the house.
(B) A girl is watering flowers in the garden while listening to music.
(C) A girl is picking flowers in the garden by herself.
explanation: 句子說「女孩邊聽音樂邊在花園澆花」，(B) 完全符合，故選 B。(A) 在室內彈吉他、(C) 摘花，均不符。
optionsZh: 女孩邊聽音樂邊在花園澆花。

dialogue: Woman: Three dogs are sleeping next to each other under the big tree.
question: Which description best matches what you heard?
options: (A) Three dogs are sleeping together under the big tree.
(B) Two dogs are playing beside the tree.
(C) One dog is climbing up the big tree.
explanation: 句子說「三隻狗在大樹下並排睡覺」，(A) 完全符合，故選 A。(B) 兩隻、在玩，(C) 一隻、爬樹，均不符。
optionsZh: 三隻狗在大樹下一起睡覺。

dialogue: Man: The family is having a picnic in the park and the children are flying kites.
question: Which description best matches what you heard?
options: (A) A family is celebrating a birthday at a restaurant.
(B) Children are playing soccer in the park.
(C) A family is having a picnic and the children are flying kites.
explanation: 句子說「全家在公園野餐，孩子們放風箏」，(C) 完全符合，故選 C。(A) 在餐廳、(B) 踢足球，均不符。
optionsZh: 全家在公園野餐，孩子們放風箏。

dialogue: Woman: The man is cooking in the kitchen and talking on the phone at the same time.
question: Which description best matches what you heard?
options: (A) A man is cooking in the kitchen while talking on the phone.
(B) A man is ordering food at a restaurant on the phone.
(C) A man is washing dishes after dinner.
explanation: 句子說「男士在廚房邊煮飯邊講電話」，(A) 完全符合，故選 A。(B) 在餐廳點餐、(C) 洗碗，均不符。
optionsZh: 男士在廚房邊煮飯邊講電話。
男士在餐廳用電話點餐。

dialogue: Man: The boy is riding his bike to school and waving to his friends on the way.
question: Which description best matches what you heard?
options: (A) A boy is walking to school with a big backpack.
(B) A boy is riding his bike to school and waving to his friends.
(C) A boy is taking the bus to school.
explanation: 句子說「男孩騎腳踏車上學並向朋友揮手」，(B) 完全符合，故選 B。(A) 走路、(C) 搭公車，均不符。
optionsZh: 男孩走路上學並背著大書包。
男孩騎腳踏車上學並向朋友揮手。

dialogue: Man: Do you know where the nearest ATM is?
question: Which is the best response?
options: (A) Yes, there's one right around the corner.
(B) I don't have a credit card.
(C) My bank is closed on weekends.
explanation: 問「最近的 ATM 在哪裡？」，(A) 「就在轉角那裡」直接回答位置，最恰當，故選 A。

dialogue: Woman: Would you like some more coffee?
question: Which is the best response?
options: (A) No thanks, I've had enough.
(B) I usually wake up at seven.
(C) Coffee is really expensive these days.
explanation: 問「還要再來點咖啡嗎？」，(A) 「不了謝謝，我喝夠了」是直接正確的回應，故選 A。

dialogue: Man: I just got promoted at work!
question: Which is the best response?
options: (A) I'm sorry to hear that.
(B) Congratulations! You really deserve it.
(C) When did you start working there?
explanation: 男士說升職了，(B) 「恭喜！你真的值得」是最合適的回應，故選 B。(A) 「遺憾」不合情境。
optionsZh: 你什麼時候開始在那裡工作的？

dialogue: Woman: Have you seen my glasses? I can't find them anywhere.
question: Which is the best response?
options: (A) I think you left them on the dining table.
(B) I like your glasses very much.
(C) Glasses are very expensive to fix.
explanation: 問「有沒有看到我的眼鏡？」，(A) 「我覺得你放在餐桌上了」直接給出線索，最恰當，故選 A。
optionsZh: 我覺得你放在餐桌上了。

dialogue: Man: Is it okay if I sit here?
question: Which is the best response?
options: (A) Sure, no one's using that seat.
(B) I'm sitting on the floor.
(C) Yes, but the chair is broken.
explanation: 問「我可以坐這裡嗎？」，(A) 「當然，那個位子沒人坐」是正確允許的回應，故選 A。(C) 若椅子壞了不應說「可以」。

dialogue: Woman: Could you turn down the music a little? I'm trying to study.
question: Which is the best response?
options: (A) Of course, sorry about that.
(B) This is my favorite song.
(C) I don't know how to play music.
explanation: 請求「可以把音樂調小聲一點嗎？」，(A) 「當然，不好意思」是禮貌正確的回應，故選 A。
optionsZh: 我不知道怎麼播放音樂。

dialogue: Man: Can you recommend a good restaurant near here?
question: Which is the best response?
options: (A) I had lunch at home today.
(B) There's a great Italian place just two blocks away.
(C) That restaurant was closed when I arrived.
explanation: 問「附近有好餐廳推薦嗎？」，(B) 「兩個街區外有家很棒的義大利餐廳」直接回答，故選 B。
optionsZh: 兩個街區外有家很棒的義大利餐廳。
我到的時候那家餐廳已關門了。

dialogue: Woman: I'm thinking of learning to play the guitar. Any tips?
question: Which is the best response?
options: (A) I prefer listening to classical music.
(B) Guitars are really expensive to buy.
(C) Start with simple songs and practice every day.
explanation: 問學吉他有什麼訣竅，(C) 「從簡單的歌開始，每天練習」是實用的建議，故選 C。
optionsZh: 從簡單的歌開始，每天練習。

dialogue: Man: Aren't you going to eat anything? It's already noon.
question: Which is the best response?
options: (A) Yes, I had a big breakfast this morning.
(B) I'm not really hungry right now.
(C) Lunch is usually my favorite meal.
explanation: 問「你不打算吃東西嗎？已經中午了。」，(B) 「我現在不太餓」直接回答原因，故選 B。
optionsZh: 有啊，我今早吃了豐盛早餐。
午餐通常是我最喜歡的一餐。

dialogue: Woman: I can't believe it's already the last day of school!
question: Which is the best response?
options: (A) I know! Time really flies.
(B) I forgot to bring my textbook.
(C) School starts at eight thirty.
explanation: 感嘆「竟然已經是最後一天了！」，(A) 「我知道！時間過得真快」是最自然的附和，故選 A。

dialogue: Man: My flight got delayed by two hours. What should I do?
question: Which is the best response?
options: (A) Flying is my favorite way to travel.
(B) You could grab something to eat at the airport.
(C) The airport is really far from the city center.
explanation: 說「班機延誤兩小時，我該怎麼辦？」，(B) 「可以去機場裡吃點東西」是實用建議，故選 B。
optionsZh: 搭飛機是我最喜歡的旅行方式。
你可以去機場裡吃點東西。
機場離市中心真的很遠。

dialogue: Woman: Do you know where I can find Dr. Holland? I need to talk to him.
question: Which is the best response?
options: (A) I'm not sure. Have you tried calling him?
(B) Dr. Holland is a very kind person.
(C) Yes, you can go ask him yourself.
explanation: 問「Holland 博士在哪裡？」，(A) 「不確定，你有試著打電話給他嗎？」承認不清楚並給出建議，最合適，故選 A。
optionsZh: 我不確定，你有試著打電話給他嗎？
Holland 博士是個很親切的人。

dialogue:
Man: Hey, are you still coming to the park tomorrow?
Woman: I just checked the forecast. It's going to be really cold. Maybe we should change our plans.
Man: What about going to an indoor game center instead?
Woman: That sounds fun! Let's do that.
question: What do they decide to do?
options: (A) Have a picnic in the park.
(B) Stay home and rest.
(C) Go to an indoor game center.
explanation: 因為天氣冷，取消去公園的計畫，最後決定去室內遊戲中心，故選 C。

dialogue:
Woman: Welcome. Are you ready to order?
Man: Yes. I'd like the chicken salad and a glass of orange juice, please.
Woman: Sorry, we're out of orange juice today. Would you like lemonade instead?
Man: Sure, that works.
question: What drink does the man order in the end?
options: (A) Orange juice.
(B) Lemonade.
(C) Mineral water.
explanation: 柳橙汁賣完，男士接受改點檸檬水，故選 B。

dialogue: Woman: The school library has a few rules. Please keep your voice down at all times. All books must be returned within two weeks. Food and drinks are not allowed inside. If you have questions, please ask the librarian.
question: Which rule about the library is correct?
options: (A) Books must be returned within one week.
(B) Drinks are allowed but food is not.
(C) Visitors must keep quiet at all times.
explanation: 規定說「隨時保持安靜」，(C) 正確。書籍是兩週內歸還（非一週）；食物和飲料都不允許（非只禁食物），故選 C。
optionsZh: 書籍必須在一週內歸還。
可以喝水但不能吃食物。
訪客必須隨時保持安靜。

dialogue:
Boy: Mom, I can't find my PE uniform. I have class tomorrow.
Mom: Did you check your gym bag?
Boy: I looked. It's not there.
Mom: Oh, I think I left it in the dryer. Let me check.
Boy: Thank goodness. That was close.
question: Where is the PE uniform most likely?
options: (A) In the gym locker.
(B) In the dryer.
(C) In the boy's school bag.
explanation: 媽媽說她覺得把衣服放在烘乾機裡忘了拿，故選 B。

dialogue:
Woman: Any plans for the weekend?
Man: I was going to go hiking, but my knee has been bothering me. I think I'll just stay home and watch movies.
Woman: I'm sorry to hear that. Hope you feel better soon.
Man: Thanks. What about you?
Woman: I'm going to my cousin's wedding on Saturday.
question: What will the man do this weekend?
options: (A) Go hiking in the mountains.
(B) Attend a wedding.
(C) Stay home and watch movies.
explanation: 男士因膝蓋不舒服，放棄登山計畫，決定待在家看電影，故選 C。去婚禮是女士的計畫。

dialogue: Man: Our community center is looking for volunteers this Saturday from nine to twelve. Volunteers will help sort donated clothes and prepare food packages for families in need. No experience is needed. If interested, please sign up at the front desk by Friday.
question: Which statement about the volunteer event is correct?
options: (A) The event is held on Sunday.
(B) No experience is needed to join.
(C) Applicants must have related experience.
explanation: 廣播說「不需要任何經驗」，(B) 正確。活動在星期六（非星期日），故選 B。
optionsZh: 報名者必須有相關工作經驗。

dialogue:
Woman: How did your math test go?
Man: Better than I expected! I got an 88.
Woman: That's great! You were so stressed about it.
Man: I know. I stayed up until midnight studying, and it paid off.
Woman: Well done. Let's celebrate with ice cream!
question: Which statement about the man is correct?
options: (A) He failed the test.
(B) He stayed up late studying and got a good grade.
(C) He thought the test was easy.
explanation: 男士熬夜讀書到午夜，考了88分，「it paid off」代表值得，故選 B。(A) 不及格錯誤，(C) 他其實很緊張。
optionsZh: 他熬夜讀書並取得好成績。

dialogue:
Man: I'd like to send this package to the US.
Woman: Let me weigh it. It's two kilograms. Standard shipping or express?
Man: How long does standard take?
Woman: About ten to fourteen business days.
Man: I need it to arrive by next week. I'll go with express.
Woman: That'll be 650 dollars.
question: Why does the man choose express shipping?
options: (A) Because express shipping is cheaper.
(B) Because standard shipping takes too long.
(C) Because the package is too heavy for standard shipping.
explanation: 標準運送需 10–14 個工作天，但男士需要下週前到達，所以選快遞，故選 B。重量不是理由。
optionsZh: 因為快遞比標準運送便宜。
因為標準運送需要太長時間。
因為包裹太重無法用標準運送。

dialogue: Woman: Attention, shoppers. Our store will be closing in fifteen minutes. Please bring your selections to the register. Our summer sale ends today. All sale items are fifty percent off the original price. Thank you for your visit.
question: What is the main purpose of this announcement?
options: (A) To introduce new products.
(B) To inform customers the store is closing and the sale ends today.
(C) To tell customers the store is moving to a new location.
explanation: 廣播通知 15 分鐘後關店，並提醒夏季特賣今天結束，(B) 符合廣播目的，故選 B。
optionsZh: 通知顧客即將關店並提醒夏季特賣今天結束。
告知顧客店鋪即將搬遷。

dialogue:
Man: Okay class, put your phones away. We're starting the lesson.
Woman: Can I use my phone to look up a word?
Man: Use the dictionary on your desk instead. Phones are not allowed during class.
Woman: But my dictionary is at home.
Man: You can borrow one from the bookshelf. Please put your phone in your bag.
question: What does the teacher ask the student to do?
options: (A) Use her phone to look up words.
(B) Borrow a dictionary from a classmate.
(C) Put her phone away and borrow a dictionary from the bookshelf.
explanation: 老師說手機不能用、字典可從書架借，並要求學生把手機放進書包，(C) 完全符合，故選 C。
optionsZh: 把手機收進書包並從書架借字典。

dialogue: Man: The girl is standing on a chair to reach the top shelf of the bookcase.
question: Which description best matches what you heard?
options: (A) The girl is standing on a chair to reach the top shelf.
(B) The girl is sitting on the floor reading a book.
(C) The girl is sleeping in her bed.
explanation: 句子說「女孩站在椅子上要拿書櫃最上層的東西」，(A) 完全符合，故選 A。(B) 坐在地板看書、(C) 睡覺，均不符。
optionsZh: 女孩站在椅子上要拿書櫃最上層的東西。

dialogue: Woman: Two boys are playing basketball on the court behind the school.
question: Which description best matches what you heard?
options: (A) Two boys are swimming in the pool.
(B) Two boys are playing basketball behind the school.
(C) One boy is reading alone in the classroom.
explanation: 句子說「兩個男孩在學校後面的球場打籃球」，(B) 完全符合，故選 B。
optionsZh: 兩個男孩在游泳池游泳。
兩個男孩在學校後面打籃球。
一個男孩獨自在教室看書。

dialogue: Man: The old man is feeding the birds beside the lake every morning.
question: Which description best matches what you heard?
options: (A) The old man is fishing beside the lake.
(B) The old man is walking his dog in the park.
(C) The old man is feeding the birds beside the lake.
explanation: 句子說「老先生每天早上在湖邊餵鳥」，(C) 完全符合，故選 C。
optionsZh: 老先生每天早上在湖邊餵鳥。

dialogue: Woman: The students are cleaning the classroom windows after class.
question: Which description best matches what you heard?
options: (A) The students are cleaning the classroom windows.
(B) The students are eating lunch in the classroom.
(C) The students are drawing pictures on the board.
explanation: 句子說「學生放學後在擦教室的窗戶」，(A) 完全符合，故選 A。
optionsZh: 學生正在擦教室的窗戶。
學生正在教室裡吃午餐。

dialogue: Man: The baby is crying loudly because she dropped her toy on the floor.
question: Which description best matches what you heard?
options: (A) The baby is laughing at her toy.
(B) The baby is crying because she dropped her toy.
(C) The baby is sleeping quietly in the room.
explanation: 句子說「嬰兒因為玩具掉在地上而大哭」，(B) 完全符合，故選 B。
optionsZh: 嬰兒因為玩具掉在地上而哭。
嬰兒在房間裡安靜地睡覺。

dialogue: Woman: The workers are building a new bridge across the river.
question: Which description best matches what you heard?
options: (A) The workers are painting a house.
(B) The workers are fixing a broken road.
(C) The workers are building a new bridge across the river.
explanation: 句子說「工人正在河上建造一座新橋」，(C) 完全符合，故選 C。
optionsZh: 工人正在修理損壞的道路。
工人正在河上建造一座新橋。

dialogue: Man: The cat is sleeping on top of the warm car in the sun.
question: Which description best matches what you heard?
options: (A) The cat is running after a mouse.
(B) The cat is sleeping on top of a warm car.
(C) The cat is drinking milk from a bowl.
explanation: 句子說「貓咪在陽光下趴在溫暖的車頂睡覺」，(B) 完全符合，故選 B。
optionsZh: 貓咪趴在溫暖的車頂睡覺。

dialogue: Woman: The girl is drawing a picture of her family on a piece of paper.
question: Which description best matches what you heard?
options: (A) The girl is drawing a picture of her family.
(B) The girl is writing a letter to her friend.
(C) The girl is folding paper into a boat.
explanation: 句子說「女孩正在紙上畫她的家人」，(A) 完全符合，故選 A。
optionsZh: 女孩正在紙上畫她的家人。
女孩正在把紙折成小船。

dialogue: Man: The farmer is picking apples in the field early in the morning.
question: Which description best matches what you heard?
options: (A) The farmer is planting seeds in the field.
(B) The farmer is picking apples in the field.
(C) The farmer is driving a truck to the market.
explanation: 句子說「農夫一大早在田裡摘蘋果」，(B) 完全符合，故選 B。

dialogue: Woman: The boy fell off his bike but he stood up and smiled.
question: Which description best matches what you heard?
options: (A) The boy fell off his bike and started crying.
(B) The boy fell off his bike but stood up and smiled.
(C) The boy is riding his bike very fast.
explanation: 句子說「男孩從腳踏車上摔下來，但站起來笑了」，(B) 完全符合，故選 B。
optionsZh: 男孩從腳踏車摔下來後哭了。
男孩摔下腳踏車但站起來笑了。
男孩正騎腳踏車騎得很快。

dialogue: Man: The teacher is writing new words on the board and the students are copying them.
question: Which description best matches what you heard?
options: (A) The teacher is writing new words and the students are copying them.
(B) The students are taking a test in silence.
(C) The teacher is singing a song with the students.
explanation: 句子說「老師在黑板上寫新單字，學生們在抄寫」，(A) 完全符合，故選 A。
optionsZh: 老師寫新單字，學生們在抄寫。

dialogue: Woman: The waiter is bringing hot soup to the table by the window.
question: Which description best matches what you heard?
options: (A) The waiter is cleaning the table by the window.
(B) The waiter is bringing hot soup to the table by the window.
(C) The waiter is taking the menu away from the table.
explanation: 句子說「服務生正端熱湯到窗邊的桌子」，(B) 完全符合，故選 B。
optionsZh: 服務生正在清理窗邊的桌子。
服務生正端熱湯到窗邊的桌子。
服務生正把菜單從桌上收走。

dialogue: Man: The children are jumping into the pool one after another.
question: Which description best matches what you heard?
options: (A) The children are sitting quietly by the pool.
(B) The children are jumping into the pool one after another.
(C) The children are drying their hair after a shower.
explanation: 句子說「孩子們一個接一個跳進游泳池」，(B) 完全符合，故選 B。
optionsZh: 孩子們安靜地坐在游泳池邊。
孩子們一個接一個跳進游泳池。
孩子們洗完澡在吹乾頭髮。

dialogue: Woman: The man is fixing the broken chair with a hammer in the yard.
question: Which description best matches what you heard?
options: (A) The man is buying a new chair at the store.
(B) The man is throwing away an old chair.
(C) The man is fixing the broken chair with a hammer.
explanation: 句子說「男士在院子裡用鎚子修理壞掉的椅子」，(C) 完全符合，故選 C。
optionsZh: 男士正用鎚子修理壞掉的椅子。

dialogue: Man: The girl is helping her little brother tie his shoes before school.
question: Which description best matches what you heard?
options: (A) The girl is helping her little brother tie his shoes.
(B) The girl is teaching her brother to read.
(C) The girl is carrying her brother on her back.
explanation: 句子說「女孩在上學前幫弟弟綁鞋帶」，(A) 完全符合，故選 A。
optionsZh: 女孩正在幫弟弟綁鞋帶。

dialogue: Woman: What time does the movie start tonight?
question: Which is the best response?
options: (A) It starts at seven thirty.
(B) I like action movies the most.
(C) The ticket costs two hundred dollars.
explanation: 問「電影今晚幾點開始？」，(A) 「七點半開始」直接回答時間，故選 A。

dialogue: Man: I feel really tired today. I didn't sleep well last night.
question: Which is the best response?
options: (A) You should try to rest more tonight.
(B) I slept for ten hours last night.
(C) Tomorrow is a holiday.
explanation: 說「今天很累，昨晚沒睡好」，(A) 「你今晚應該多休息」是關心的回應，故選 A。

dialogue: Woman: Excuse me, does this bus go to the train station?
question: Which is the best response?
options: (A) Yes, it stops there in about ten minutes.
(B) The train was very crowded this morning.
(C) I usually walk to school.
explanation: 問「這班公車有到火車站嗎？」，(A) 「有，大約十分鐘後會停在那裡」直接回答，故選 A。
optionsZh: 有，大約十分鐘後會停靠那裡。

dialogue: Man: I lost my umbrella somewhere on the bus.
question: Which is the best response?
options: (A) That's too bad. You can ask the driver about it.
(B) It's sunny outside today.
(C) I bought a new bag yesterday.
explanation: 說「我在公車上弄丟了雨傘」，(A) 「真可惜，你可以問司機」給出實用建議，故選 A。
optionsZh: 真可惜，你可以問司機看看。
我昨天買了一個新包包。

dialogue: Woman: How was your trip to the mountains last weekend?
question: Which is the best response?
options: (A) It was amazing. The air was so fresh.
(B) I go to school every weekday.
(C) The mountain is very tall and cold.
explanation: 問「上週末的山上旅行如何？」，(A) 「很棒，空氣很新鮮」是最自然的回應，故選 A。

dialogue: Man: Could you help me carry this box upstairs?
question: Which is the best response?
options: (A) Sure, let me help you with that.
(B) The box is empty now.
(C) I don't like going upstairs.
explanation: 請求「可以幫我把這個箱子搬上樓嗎？」，(A) 「當然，讓我幫你」是禮貌合適的回應，故選 A。

dialogue: Woman: This soup tastes a little too salty for me.
question: Which is the best response?
options: (A) Sorry, I'll add some water to it.
(B) I don't like cold weather.
(C) The soup is still cooking on the stove.
explanation: 說「這湯對我來說有點太鹹了」，(A) 「抱歉，我加點水」是合理回應，故選 A。

dialogue: Man: I heard you got first place in the singing event!
question: Which is the best response?
options: (A) Thanks! I practiced really hard for it.
(B) I don't know how to sing at all.
(C) The event will start next month.
explanation: 說「聽說你在歌唱活動拿了第一名！」，(A) 「謝謝！我很努力練習」是自然的回應，故選 A。

dialogue: Woman: Why is the road so quiet this morning?
question: Which is the best response?
options: (A) Because it's a national holiday today.
(B) The road is usually very wide.
(C) I drove to work by car.
explanation: 問「為什麼今天早上路上這麼安靜？」，(A) 「因為今天是國定假日」直接解釋原因，故選 A。

dialogue: Man: My computer stopped working this morning. Can you take a look?
question: Which is the best response?
options: (A) Sure, let me check what's wrong with it.
(B) I bought a new phone last week.
(C) Computers are very cheap now.
explanation: 問「我的電腦今早壞了，你可以看看嗎？」，(A) 「當然，讓我檢查一下」是最直接的回應，故選 A。
optionsZh: 當然，讓我檢查一下哪裡出問題。

dialogue: Woman: Do you want to join our club after school?
question: Which is the best response?
options: (A) Sounds great! What does the club do?
(B) School ends at four every day.
(C) I forgot my homework at home.
explanation: 問「要不要放學後加入我們的社團？」，(A) 「聽起來不錯！社團做什麼？」是自然回應，故選 A。
optionsZh: 聽起來不錯！社團是做什麼的？

dialogue: Man: The line at the store is really long today.
question: Which is the best response?
options: (A) Yeah, let's come back later.
(B) The store is closed on Mondays.
(C) I like shopping online instead.
explanation: 說「今天店裡排隊排很長」，(A) 「對啊，我們晚點再來」是自然的建議，故選 A。

dialogue: Woman: Are you free this Friday evening?
question: Which is the best response?
options: (A) Yes, I don't have any plans yet.
(B) Friday is my favorite subject.
(C) I finished my homework already.
explanation: 問「你這週五晚上有空嗎？」，(A) 「有，我還沒有計畫」直接回答，故選 A。
optionsZh: 有，我還沒有安排任何計畫。
星期五是我最喜歡的科目。

dialogue: Man: This shirt is nice, but do you have it in a smaller size?
question: Which is the best response?
options: (A) Let me check in the back for you.
(B) The color is really popular this year.
(C) I bought this shirt last month.
explanation: 問「這件襯衫不錯，但有小一號的嗎？」，(A) 「我幫你到後面找找看」是店員合適回應，故選 A。
optionsZh: 這個顏色今年很受歡迎。
我上個月買了這件襯衫。

dialogue: Woman: I'm worried about my science test tomorrow.
question: Which is the best response?
options: (A) Don't worry. I can help you study tonight.
(B) Science is my least favorite class.
(C) The test was easy last year.
explanation: 說「我很擔心明天的自然科考試」，(A) 「別擔心，我今晚可以幫你複習」是最合適的安慰，故選 A。
optionsZh: 別擔心，我今晚可以幫你複習。
自然科是我最不喜歡的科目。

dialogue: Man: The weather report says it might snow tonight.
question: Which is the best response?
options: (A) Really? I should wear a warmer coat then.
(B) It rained a lot last summer.
(C) I love swimming in the sea.
explanation: 說「氣象說今晚可能下雪」，(A) 「真的嗎？那我該穿暖一點的外套」是自然回應，故選 A。
optionsZh: 真的嗎？那我該穿暖一點的外套。

dialogue: Woman: Can you tell me how to get to the post office?
question: Which is the best response?
options: (A) Sure, go straight and turn left at the corner.
(B) I sent a letter yesterday.
(C) The office opens at nine in the morning.
explanation: 問「你能告訴我怎麼去郵局嗎？」，(A) 「當然，直走然後在轉角左轉」直接指路，故選 A。
optionsZh: 當然，直走然後在轉角左轉。

dialogue: Man: My little sister broke my favorite cup by accident.
question: Which is the best response?
options: (A) That's okay, accidents happen sometimes.
(B) The cup is very heavy to carry.
(C) I washed all the cups this morning.
explanation: 說「我妹妹不小心打破了我最喜歡的杯子」，(A) 「沒關係，意外難免」是體諒的回應，故選 A。
optionsZh: 我今天早上洗了所有的杯子。

dialogue: Woman: I can't decide between the red shoes and the blue ones.
question: Which is the best response?
options: (A) I think the blue ones match more of your clothes.
(B) These shoes are black in color.
(C) The store closes at nine tonight.
explanation: 說「我無法決定要紅鞋還是藍鞋」，(A) 「我覺得藍色比較搭你的衣服」是有幫助的建議，故選 A。
optionsZh: 我覺得藍色比較搭你的衣服。

dialogue: Man: I'm going to visit my grandmother this summer. Any advice for the trip?
question: Which is the best response?
options: (A) Bring some gifts and call before you arrive.
(B) My grandmother lives in a big city.
(C) Summer is the hottest season of the year.
explanation: 問「今年夏天要去看奶奶，有什麼建議嗎？」，(A) 「帶些禮物，到之前先打電話」是實用建議，故選 A。
optionsZh: 帶些禮物，到之前先打電話。
夏天是一年中最熱的季節。

dialogue:
Boy: Did you finish the science project yet?
Girl: Not yet. I still need to write the report.
Boy: Do you want to work on it together this weekend?
Girl: That would be great. Let's meet at the library on Saturday.
question: What will they do on Saturday?
options: (A) Go to a science museum.
(B) Meet at the library to work on the project.
(C) Watch a movie together.
explanation: 兩人約好星期六在圖書館一起完成科展報告，故選 B。

dialogue: Woman: Welcome to City Zoo. The elephant show starts at two o'clock and the bird show starts at three thirty. Please do not feed the animals. Maps are available at the front gate.
question: Which statement about the zoo is correct?
options: (A) The elephant show starts at three thirty.
(B) Visitors are allowed to feed the animals.
(C) Maps can be found at the front gate.
explanation: 廣播說「地圖在正門可以拿」，(C) 正確。大象秀是兩點（非三點半），且禁止餵食動物，故選 C。

dialogue:
Man: Excuse me, is this seat taken?
Woman: No, go ahead.
Man: Thanks. Are you also waiting for the number twelve bus?
Woman: Yes, but I heard it's running late today because of the rain.
question: Why is the bus late today?
options: (A) Because of a traffic accident.
(B) Because of the rain.
(C) Because the driver is sick.
explanation: 女士說公車因為下雨而延誤，故選 B。

dialogue:
Girl: Mom, can I get a dog for my birthday?
Mom: A dog needs a lot of care every day. Are you ready to walk it every day?
Girl: Yes, I promise I will take care of it.
Mom: Okay, let's talk to your father about it tonight.
question: What does the mother ask the girl to think about?
options: (A) The cost of buying a dog.
(B) Whether she can take care of a dog every day.
(C) Where the dog will sleep at night.
explanation: 媽媽提醒養狗是大責任，問女兒是否能每天照顧，故選 B。

dialogue:
Man: I heard the school trip was changed from the beach to the science museum.
Woman: Really? Why did they change it?
Man: The weather forecast says it will rain that day.
Woman: That makes sense. The museum sounds interesting too.
question: Why was the school trip changed?
options: (A) The beach was too crowded.
(B) The museum ticket was cheaper.
(C) It is expected to rain on that day.
explanation: 因為預報那天會下雨，校外教學從海邊改成科學博物館，故選 C。

dialogue: Woman: This is a reminder that the school gate will be closed for repair from Monday to Wednesday next week. Students should use the side entrance near the gym during this time. We are sorry for any trouble this may cause.
question: What should students do next week?
options: (A) Enter through the side entrance near the gym.
(B) Stay home for three days.
(C) Bring their own tools to help with the repair.
explanation: 廣播說學生這段時間應改走體育館旁的側門，故選 A。
optionsZh: 改走體育館旁的側門進入。

dialogue:
Boy: I can't open this jar. Can you help me?
Dad: Let me try. Hmm, it's really tight.
Boy: Maybe we should run it under hot water first.
Dad: Good idea. That usually works.
question: What will they do to open the jar?
options: (A) Hit the jar with a spoon.
(B) Run the jar under hot water.
(C) Ask a neighbor for help.
explanation: 兩人決定先用熱水沖罐子再打開，故選 B。

dialogue:
Woman: How do you like the new restaurant downtown?
Man: The food is delicious, but the service is really slow.
Woman: That's too bad. Did you have to wait long?
Man: Almost an hour just to get our food.
question: What does the man think about the restaurant?
options: (A) Both the food and service are excellent.
(B) The food is good but the service is slow.
(C) The food is bad but the service is fast.
explanation: 男士說食物好吃，但服務很慢，等了將近一小時，故選 B。
optionsZh: 食物不好吃但服務很快。

dialogue:
Man: Did you remember to water the plants while I was away?
Woman: Oh no, I completely forgot!
Man: It's okay, most of them still look fine.
Woman: I'll water them right now, and I'm really sorry.
question: What happened while the man was away?
options: (A) The woman watered the plants every day.
(B) The woman forgot to water the plants.
(C) All of the plants died.
explanation: 女士承認完全忘記澆花，故選 B。植物大多還好，並非全部枯死。

dialogue:
Girl: I want to join the school singing group, but I'm afraid I'm not good enough.
Boy: You have a great voice! You should just try.
Girl: You really think so?
Boy: Yes, they are choosing new members next Tuesday. I'll go with you.
question: What does the boy encourage the girl to do?
options: (A) Give up joining the singing group.
(B) Try to join the school singing group.
(C) Practice singing alone at home.
explanation: 男孩鼓勵女孩去試著加入學校歌唱團體，並陪她一起去，故選 B。
optionsZh: 試著加入學校歌唱團體。

dialogue: Man: Good afternoon. This train will arrive at Central Station in twenty minutes. Passengers going to the airport should change trains at the next stop. Thank you for riding with us.
question: What should passengers going to the airport do?
options: (A) Get off at Central Station.
(B) Stay on this train the whole way.
(C) Change trains at the next stop.
explanation: 廣播說要去機場的乘客應在下一站換車，故選 C。

dialogue:
Woman: Your room is so messy! Can you clean it up before dinner?
Boy: I will, Mom. I just need ten more minutes to finish my drawing.
Woman: Okay, but please don't forget.
Boy: I won't. I promise.
question: What does the boy promise to do?
options: (A) Finish his drawing after dinner.
(B) Clean his room before dinner.
(C) Help his mother cook dinner.
explanation: 媽媽要求晚餐前整理房間，男孩答應會做到，故選 B。

dialogue:
Man: I'm thinking about growing some flowers in the garden.
Woman: That's a great idea. What do you want to grow first?
Man: Maybe roses. They're easy to grow, right?
Woman: Yes, and they need a lot of light, so plant them near the fence.
question: Where does the woman suggest planting the roses?
options: (A) Near the fence.
(B) Inside the kitchen.
(C) Under a big tree.
explanation: 女士建議因為需要充足光線，把玫瑰種在圍籬旁邊，故選 A。

dialogue:
Girl: Are you coming to my birthday party next Friday?
Boy: I'd love to, but I have a piano lesson that day.
Girl: What time does your lesson end?
Boy: Around six. I can come after that if it's okay.
Girl: Sure, that's perfect!
question: When will the boy arrive at the party?
options: (A) He will not come at all.
(B) He will come right after his piano lesson.
(C) He will come before his piano lesson.
explanation: 男孩鋼琴課六點結束，之後就會去參加派對，故選 B。
optionsZh: 他鋼琴課結束後馬上過去。
他會在鋼琴課之前先到。

dialogue: Woman: Attention, students. Tomorrow's field trip will begin at eight in the morning at the main gate. Please bring your own water and lunch. Wear comfortable shoes since we will be walking a lot. The bus will leave without you if you are late.
question: What should students do to prepare for the field trip?
options: (A) Bring water, lunch, and wear comfortable shoes.
(B) Bring only a camera and nothing else.
(C) Arrive at the main gate at nine in the morning.
explanation: 廣播說學生應自備水和午餐，並穿舒適的鞋子，(A) 完全符合，故選 A。集合時間是八點（非九點）。
optionsZh: 自備水、午餐並穿舒適的鞋子。
只帶相機，其他都不用帶。
